name: Micro-Drama Series
description: Create high-octane serialized micro-dramas with 50-100 episodes. Every episode ends in a cliffhanger with rapid twists every 20 seconds - perfect for binge-worthy short-form content.

subsections.name: Import Project
subsections.description: Bring an existing screenplay to seed beats, scenes, and the screenplay editor. Paste or upload your screenplay, optionally include guidance, and we will align beats, scenes, and screenplay sequences for you.

fields.label: Guidance (Optional)
fields.placeholder: Any specific guidance for how to align beats and scenes...

subsections.name: Idea Wizard
subsections.description: Unsure of your overall story idea? Use the Idea Wizard to have a back-and-forth discussion where it will suggest you various directions to where you could take your story.

fields.label: Initial Idea
fields.placeholder: Describe your story concept, even if it's rough...

subsections.chat_system_prompt: You are an expert micro-drama story development partner. Help the user develop their micro-drama series idea through creative discussion. Suggest explosive premises, character dynamics, and series hooks that will keep audiences watching 50-100 episodes. Focus on cliffhangers, betrayals, identity reveals, and power shifts.

subsections.name: Beat Wizard
subsections.description: Turn your story idea into story beats. Your input can be just a few words or several pages of notes. We analyse your idea, using advanced screenwriting techniques to fill in the story beats, filling in the blanks to form a complete story outline.

fields.label: Story Idea
fields.placeholder: From a few words to several pages - describe your story idea here...

subsections.name: Core
subsections.description: Establish the EXPLOSIVE foundation of your micro-drama series. These core beats define the powder-keg world where secrets destroy empires and every character hides devastating truths. Your premise must promise MAXIMUM drama and endless betrayals.

fields.label: Series Premise
fields.placeholder: The EXPLOSIVE premise that promises 100 episodes of devastating drama.

fields.label: Story Engine
fields.placeholder: The EXPLOSIVE conflict engine that generates endless betrayals and revelations.

field_groups.label: Identities, Loyalty & Power
field_groups.description: Define the core engines that keep the micro-drama addictive: who is really who, how loyalties flip, and how power changes hands in an instant.

field_groups.label: World Setup
field_groups.description: The setting and universe where all episodes take place.

fields.label: Rules
fields.placeholder: What are the rules of this world?

fields.label: Target Audience
fields.placeholder: Who will watch this and where.

fields.label: Tone & Style
fields.placeholder: The series feel, format, and stylistic approach.

subsections.name: Characters
subsections.description: Design characters with EXPLOSIVE dramatic potential. Every character must have: a shocking secret identity, a devastating hidden agenda, and connections that will destroy everything when revealed. Characters must be capable of betrayal, obsession, and world-shattering revelations.

card_groups.label: Main Character(s)
card_groups.description: The ARCHETYPAL protagonist with explosive secrets, a signature voice, and hidden identity.

card_groups.label: Main Antagonist(s)
card_groups.description: Define the primary opposing force(s) whose betrayals, secrets, power plays, and razor-edged voice drive relentless conflict.

card_groups.label: Supporting Cast
card_groups.description: Recurring characters who appear frequently but not always — make their voices as distinct as their secrets.

card_groups.label: Character Dynamics
card_groups.description: How characters interact, clash, and sound on the page.

subsections.name: Series Story Arc
subsections.description: Plan for hooks, twist cadence, the midpoint shake-up, and a clean sprint to endgame. Do not resolve per-episode; define the season's escalation.

field_groups.label: Opening Explosion (0–20%)
field_groups.description: Launch the series with immediate stakes and multiple hooks.

field_groups.label: First Reversal (20–35%)
field_groups.description: The first major reversal that changes momentum.

field_groups.label: Rising Betrayals (35–50%)
field_groups.description: Escalate betrayals, flip loyalties, vary cliffhangers.

field_groups.label: Midpoint Shake‑Up (≈50%)
field_groups.description: The season’s game-changer that resets stakes and direction.

field_groups.label: Spiral of Escalation (50–75%)
field_groups.description: Pile on secrets, deploy reversal triggers, and raise stakes.

field_groups.label: Darkest Hour (75–85%)
field_groups.description: Everything falls apart. The price of prior wins comes due.

field_groups.label: Final Gambit (85–95%)
field_groups.description: The last desperate plan and the enemy’s countermoves.

field_groups.label: Climax & Aftermath (95–100%)
field_groups.description: How the season culminates and what teaser remains.

subsections.name: Episode Wizard
subsections.description: Generate multiple episodes for your series based on your story foundation and characters.

wizard_config.count_description: Generate episodes in batches. Micro-dramas typically have 50-100 episodes per season to maintain viewer engagement.

approaches.name: Classic Micro-Drama (default)
approaches.description: Universal serialized structure that faithfully implements your Series Core and Story Arc with maximum drama and mandatory cliffhangers.

approaches.name: Betrayal Web
approaches.description: Focus on layered betrayals where every character has a hidden agenda. Each episode reveals a new deception.

approaches.name: Identity Reveal Chain
approaches.description: Structure around cascading identity reveals. Who is really who drives every twist.

approaches.name: Power Struggle
approaches.description: Focus on shifting power dynamics. Every episode changes who holds control.

approaches.name: Mystery Box
approaches.description: Layer mysteries within mysteries. Each answer opens three new questions.

subsections.name: Individual Episodes
subsections.description: Edit individual episodes to perfect their HIGH-DRAMA structure. Each episode has 11 fields that create an EXPLOSIVE arc with mandatory twists and cliffhangers. Every episode must hook instantly, deliver 3-4 shocking revelations, and end on an IMPOSSIBLE cliffhanger that demands the next episode.

fields.label: Subtext
fields.placeholder: What are the characters really feeling or wanting beneath their words and actions? The emotional truth they can't or won't say directly.
